name: Nettoyeur de Fléau
description: Véhicule lance-flammes lourd de purification. Déployé contre le Fléau Spore, il incinère méthodiquement sans jamais hésiter.
prompt: Sci-fi grimdark cyberpunk, L'Omni-Réseau faction. Heavy flamethrower purification vehicle, massive rectangular tank with industrial nozzle array, dark grey armor with orange fire glow reflecting off surfaces, cold blue neural antenna. Human head fused into hull as processor. Advancing through burning fungal landscape. Cinematic lighting, highly detailed.
